summary: Tested 6 new frontend features: Quick Add fix, Fragrance Filter, Scent Pyramid, Shipping Info Banner, Hidden Coming Soon categories, SEO meta tags. Found and fixed 1 critical bug in Quick Add - was using non-existent 'addItem' function instead of 'addToCart' from CartContext.

Quick Add in Recently Viewed.bug_found: TypeError: addItem is not a function - RecentlyViewedSection was using 'addItem' but CartContext exports 'addToCart'
Quick Add in Recently Viewed.fix_applied: Changed 'addItem' to 'addToCart' in RecentlyViewedSection.jsx line 50 and handleAddToCart function
Quick Add in Recently Viewed.verification: Quick Add now works - adds item to cart with correct pricing and shows toast notification

tests: Filter toggle expands/collapses correctly
Mood filters present: meditative, relaxing, energizing, romantic, luxurious
Note filters present: woody, floral, spicy, oriental
Intensity filters present: light, medium, strong
Floral filter shows 1 of 4 products (Regal Rose) - CORRECT
Meditative filter shows 2 of 4 products (Kesar Chandan, Oriental Oudh) - CORRECT
Clear all filters button works
Scent Pyramid component displays on each product card
Shows Top Notes, Heart Notes, Base Notes with correct icons
Regal Rose: Top(Pink Lotus, Bergamot, Green Leaves), Heart(Damask Rose, Ylang Ylang, Jasmine), Base(White Musk, Sandalwood, Honey)
Banner displays in fragrances section
Shows current shipping tier: Shipping ₹149
Shows progress to next tier: Add ₹249 more for ₹49 shipping
Progress bar shows ₹999 = Free threshold
Expandable to show full shipping rate details
Only 1 category card visible (Premium Incense Sticks)
Dhoop card NOT visible - CORRECT
Bakhoor card NOT visible - CORRECT
Home Care card NOT visible - CORRECT
Title: Addrika | Premium Incense Sticks - Sacred Luxury in Every Scent
Meta description present with relevant keywords
Open Graph tags present: og:type, og:url, og:title, og:description, og:image, og:site_name
Twitter cards present: summary_large_image with all tags
Canonical URL set

bug_fix_details.bug: Quick Add button in Recently Viewed section throws TypeError
bug_fix_details.error_message: TypeError: addItem is not a function at handleAddToCart
bug_fix_details.root_cause: RecentlyViewedSection.jsx line 50 was destructuring 'addItem' from useCart(), but CartContext exports 'addToCart'
bug_fix_details.fix: Changed line 50 from 'const { addItem } = useCart()' to 'const { addToCart } = useCart()' and updated handleAddToCart function to use addToCart(product, size, 1)
bug_fix_details.verification: Quick Add now adds items to cart correctly with toast notification

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Quick Add fix applied - now uses correct addToCart function from CartContext
✓ RecentlyViewedSection correctly stores product sizes in localStorage for proper pricing
✓ FragranceFilter correctly filters products by mood, notes, and intensity
✓ ScentPyramid displays all three note levels with proper styling
✓ CategoryGrid correctly filters active:true categories only
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 new frontend features are working. Quick Add bug was fixed by changing 'addItem' to 'addToCart' in RecentlyViewedSection.jsx. Filter functionality works correctly - Floral shows only Regal Rose (1/4), Meditative shows Kesar Chandan + Oriental Oudh (2/4). SEO meta tags are properly configured.
